segments.caption: The video opens with two men walking outdoors in a sunny, arid environment with palm trees and stone walls, one wearing a black shirt and sunglasses on his head, the other in a blue shirt and cap. The scene quickly shifts to a cyclist in a green jersey and white helmet riding through a desert landscape, exclaiming about reaching over 90 km/h. This is followed by a swimmer in a wetsuit and swim cap entering a pool, with a coach yelling to 'Stop fucking around and get swimming!' The narrative then cuts to a man in a white and green jersey, visibly dehydrated, standing in a rocky desert, followed by a close-up of a cyclist in a red jersey and white helmet, frustrated and holding his head, saying 'I don't wanna train.' The video then shows a man in a green jersey and black helmet, complaining about the wind. The scene returns to the two men walking outdoors, now with the man in the black shirt speaking animatedly, gesturing with his hands. The setting changes to an airport terminal on May 14th, 2023, where the two men, now in casual travel attire, are pulling suitcases and heading to drop off their bikes. The final shot shows them boarding an Iberia airplane, with one man smiling at the camera as they settle into their seats.
